THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EGGERT, JENNIFER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIERRO, RAFAEL PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVEN BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT IS LIABLE ON THE CLAIMS PRESENTED TO THE COURT. THE DOCUMENTS PROVIDED BY THE POLICE DEPARTMENT PURSUANT TO SUBPOENAS SHALL BE SEALED AND KEPT IN THE COURT FILE UNTIL FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT.
